:: Anarckie . com Update

Thank you for visiting anarckie.com. After 4 years of running anarckie i've decided to take a little break from it. It is not because i lost interest, it's only because i am currently pre-occupied with other projects. We WILL come back... and when we do, expect something great.

I want to thank all the devoted fans of anarckie.com over the years, who have stuck with us since our first site. You are the reason anarckie was so great.

I am currently working for Jarvis Entertainment Group and i love it. I would suggest going over there and checking out all their services (ikonBoard, Topsitelists). If you wish to see the site i am currently developing, use the link on the right side.


(note: the members signup/login doesnt work)
